zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd Ap Gwilym於1358年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，他的父親Gwilym ap Jenkin31歲，母親Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan23歲。他和Gwenlian Verch Phillip至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1419年在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd Ap Gwilym于1358年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼时，他的父亲Gwilym ap Jenkin31岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan23岁。他和Gwenlian Verch Phillip至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1419年在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd Ap Gwilym was born in 1358, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Gwilym ap Jenkin, was 31 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Gwenlian Verch Phillip. He died in 1419, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd Ap Gwilym est né en 1358, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Gwilym ap Jenkin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Gwenlian Verch Phillip. Il est décédé en 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd Ap Gwilym 1358 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwilym ap Jenkin 31 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan 23. Er hatte mit Gwenlian Verch Phillip mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Ap Gwilym è nato il nel 1358 nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gwilym ap Jenkin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Gwenlian Verch Phillip. Morì nel 1419, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Gwilymが1358年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父Gwilym ap Jenkinは31歳，母Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychanは23歳であった。彼はGwenlian Verch Phillipとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1419年に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Gwilym(이)가 1358년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwilym ap Jenkin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Gwenlian Verch Phillip(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 스트라타 플로리다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Ap Gwilym nasceu em 1358, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwilym ap Jenkin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Gwenlian Verch Phillip. Ele faleceu em 1419, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd Ap Gwilym родился в 1358 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gwilym ap Jenkin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Gwenlian Verch Phillip. Он умер в 1419 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности страта флорида, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Gwenlian Verch Phillip. Murió en 1419, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
